description_long: This is a modern, armless sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features a high, straight backrest and a wide, flat seat, both of which appear to be well-padded for comfort. Two loose, rectangular cushions are placed symmetrically on the seat, likely serving as headrests or arm supports. The base of the sofa is boxy and sits on four short, round legs that are only slightly visible. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or apartment living rooms.
description: A modern, armless sofa with a high backrest, smooth dark upholstery, and two loose cushions, designed for comfort and simplicity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, high backrest, flat seat, and two loose cushions placed symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the profile of the loose cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the boxy base, with no visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's depth and the arrangement of the cushions from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, rectangular cushions placed symmetrically on the seat; seat and backrest are single, continuous padded sections.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; sides are open and flush with the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, round legs, positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of dark-colored plastic or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no visible segmentation or tufting; fully padded and upholstered.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
